subcodes.first_line: Today is the Day of triumph and victory; it is hoped that through the hosts of wisdom and utterance His loved ones may conquer hearts and minds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یوم یوم نصر و ظفر است امید آنکه بجنود حکمت و بیان اولیایش افئده و قلوب را مسخر
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @growth of the Cause, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @praise and encouragement
